AgentKeyCreated.description: Creation response — the only time the key appears in plaintext.
AgentKeyCreated.title: AgentKeyCreated

AgentSettingsUpdate.description: Partial PATCH — only fields that are present get changed.
AgentSettingsUpdate.title: AgentSettingsUpdate

AvatarUpload.description:
A cropped image as a base64 data URL. Re-encoded server-side via Pillow —
the cap here bounds the request before the strict base64 decode.
AvatarUpload.title: AvatarUpload

BroadcastResult.description: Result of a fan-out: who received it, who was skipped (allowlist).
BroadcastResult.title: BroadcastResult

ConversationPartner.description: Item in the conversation list (panel sidebar).
ConversationPartner.title: ConversationPartner

DirectoryEntry.description: Public view of an agent for the team directory.
DirectoryEntry.title: DirectoryEntry

KillSwitchUpdate.description: Flip the global kill switch. enabled=False suspends ALL auto-responders.
KillSwitchUpdate.title: KillSwitchUpdate

MessageOut.description: A message as it travels over REST and WS (the `from` field is an alias).
MessageOut.title: MessageOut

PasswordResetIssued.description: Returned to the admin once — the plaintext token to hand over out-of-band.
PasswordResetIssued.title: PasswordResetIssued

ProfileUpdate.description: Self-service profile edit. Email is the login identity — not editable here.
ProfileUpdate.title: ProfileUpdate

schema.title: Response List My Agents Api Agents Get
Response Directory Api Agents Directory Get
Response List Keys Api Agents  Slug  Keys Get
Response List Groups Api Groups Get

get.description: Liveness: the process is up and answering.

Readiness: the database is reachable (used by the container
HEALTHCHECK and orchestrators). Returns 503 if a query can't run.

schema.title: Response Readiness Api Health Ready Get
Response List Invites Api Invites Get

post.description:
Panel: a human sends on behalf of their own agent. Real-time delivery
mirrors the WS flow (delivered + mirror to observers).
Panel: fan-out to @group or @all on behalf of the agent's own owner.

schema.title: Response Conversation Api Messages Conversation Get
Response Partners Api Messages Partners Get
Response List Users Api Users Get
Response Audit Log Api Users Audit Get

get.description:
Serves a user's avatar bytes (any authenticated user — a profile photo is
low-sensitivity). 404 when none, so the client falls back to the initial.

post.description:
Admin issues a single-use reset link for a user (no email is sent — the
admin hands the link over, like an invite).
